economic_notes: Bloodvein First Nation holds a one-seventh ownership interest in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (which includes South Beach Capital Partners Limited Partnership and South Beach Management Services Ltd.), operating a casino and hotel on Brokenhead Ojibway Nation land at Scanterbury, Manitoba. Management noted liquidity risk as cash and receivables may not cover all payables and deferred revenue. Economic development initiatives are being evaluated.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Consolidated entity includes Bloodvein First Nation, Bloodvein First Nation Health Authority, and Bloodvein First Nation Housing Authority on a line-by-line basis. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership is accounted for using the modified equity method (GBE). The segment disclosure note (Note 22) appears to be cut off in the provided text. No schedule of remuneration was provided. Net debt of $5,065,946 reported on statement of changes in net debt. Construction in progress of $30,950,948 for Lake Winnipeg School bundle is not included in tangible capital assets net book value. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($15,827,130) plus CMHC ($525,645) = $16,352,775. OSR calculated as total revenue ($20,948,793) minus total government transfers ($16,352,775) = $4,596,018. Prior year ISC per Note 14 was $22,551,197 but statement shows $22,551,197 budget and $22,551,197 actual; cash received from ISC in 2022 was $22,570,950.
warnings: High ISC dependency (75.55%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
